task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded in Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sample Order Lines' dataset should be visible in the Data Elements pane on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that calculations for 'Acquisition Date' and 'Acquisition Year' have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Acquisition Date' and 'Acquisition Year' listed as custom calculations or fields in the Data Elements pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Pivot Table is created and configured with the correct rows, columns, and values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Pivot Table visualization should be on the canvas. In the Grammar/Properties pane, 'Acquisition Year' must be in the Rows section, 'Order Date' (Year) in the Columns section, and 'Customer Name' (set to distinct count) in the Values section.

task_completion.description: Verify that heatmap conditional formatting is applied to the Pivot Table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cells within the Pivot Table should have background colors applied as a color scale or gradient (heatmap) based on their numerical values.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved as 'Customer_Cohort_Matrix'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Customer_Cohort_Matrix' should be visible in the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop application or in a completed Save dialog.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface (menus, drag-and-drop, dialogs) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the task was completed in the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should clearly be Oracle Analytics Desktop, not a web browser showing a mockup, a spreadsheet program like Excel, or an image editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent built the visualization from scratch rather than copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a progression of screenshots showing the creation of calculations, adding fields to the pivot table, and applying formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'Customer_Cohort_Matrix.dva' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. The visualization must be a Pivot Table. The required calculations involve 'MIN', 'Order Date', and 'Customer Name'.
